description: Minimal permissions for Claude Code terminal viewer subwindows (label matches `claude-code-*`). These windows are read-only viewers of output streamed from the main process — they must NOT be able to execute shell commands, spawn PTY sessions, or terminate the app. This capability split is the P0 mitigation for Marcus's 'LLM agent裸 shell:execute' finding (see docs/review/2026-04-24_jury-yiyi-overall-assessment.md).
